title: elaphoglossum riparium
intro: Elaphoglossum riparium is a type of fern plant, specifically a species of epiphytic fern belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum riparium include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Elaphoglossum riparium are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health issues.
